sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) goodness. Psa 119:66, טוּב טַעַם “goodness of intelligence,” good understanding; the goodness, i.e. the kindness of God, Psa 25:7 27:13 31:20 145:7 Jer 31:14.

(2) concr. that which is good, or best of any thing, i.e. the best part, Gen 45:18, 20 Gen 45:20. טוּב הָאָרֶץ the best gifts of the land, Gen 45:23 Isa 1:19 Ezr 9:12.

(3) goods, i.e. wealth, property, Deu 6:11 precious things, Gen 24:10 comp. verses 22 Gen 24:22, 30 Gen 24:30.

(4) beauty. Hos 10:11 Zec 9:17. Used of the divine glory, Exo 33:19, אֲנִי אַעֲבִיד כָּל־טוּבִי. [But is this the sense of the passage? See No. 1.]

(5) welfare, happiness, Job 20:21 21:16 Pro 11:10.

(6) with the addition of לֵב gladness, cheerfulness. Deu 28:47 Isa 65:14.
